ab: Hongay, iraay kiso i loma’ haw?
en: Hongay, are you home?

ab: Iraay. Micomod.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Hongay, iraay kiso i loma’ haw?
en: Hongay, are you home?

ab: Awaay i loma’ ci Hongay! Ci Dakoc kako, mimaan saw? Minokay to ci Hongay, sowal han to ako.
ch: B:Hongay不在家耶!我是Dakoc，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Hongay。
en: Hongay is not at home. I am Dakoc. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: Cima kamo?
en: Who are you?

ab: Fofo, ci Hongay aci Dakoc kami, fawahen ho ko loma’!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Hongay和Dakoc，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Hongay and Dakoc, please open the door for us.

ab: Cima saw?
en: Who is it?

ab: Ci Kolas kako, mikilimay kako ci Taloan.
en: I am Kolas, I am here for Talo.

ab: Fofo, tayniay to kako miliso’ tisowanan.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Wata halafin to ca ka tayni kiso, ma’ilol to kako tisowanan.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Hongay, tayniay to kako, misalama kita.
en: Hongay, I am here to play with you.

ab: Micomod, halafin to ko pitala no mako tisowanan.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: O nipalomaan ako a konga koni, tanamen a komaen!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: Sakoesan sa a kaenen kona konga.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Katayni ho! O nipalomaan ako a losay koni, tanamen a komaen.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: Sakoesan sa a kaenen kona losay.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Kamaro’ ho! O nipalomaan ako a ’ariray koni to cowa kasiwtoken, tanamen a komaen!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: Em! Sakoesan sa a kaenen.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: Komaen kiso to ’asiro haw?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: Ca kanga’ay kako komaen to ’asiro, o lingko sa ko kaenen no mako.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: Komaen kiso to ’odax haw?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: Hai, maolahay kako.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Podacen no mako ko losay to hakakaenen no miso.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Ahowiday, makasalang kona losay.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Pananomen ako kiso.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: Ahowiday.
en: Thank you.

ab: Adihayen ko nikaenan, adihay ko nisafelan ako a dateng.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Em! fangsis sanay, ’adetay a kaenen.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: Adihayen ko nikaenan, adihayay ho ini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: Ca to kangodo ako yo!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: Adihayen ko nikaenan, adihayay ho ini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Adihayay to ko nikaenan no mako, ca to kanga’ay a komaen.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
